preparations: Fragariastrum montanum, also known as the Bearberry, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. Herbal preparations from Bearberry include tea and infusions made from its leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and have been used to treat various health issues. In herbal medicine, Bearberry is often used to treat urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and skin problems. intro: Fragariastrum montanum, commonly known as Mountain Strawberry or Fragariastrum, is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Fragariastrum montanum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
